description_long: This is a detached suburban house set on a large rectangular green lawn with a long, curved driveway leading up to the front entrance. The house features a light gray gable roof with multiple slopes and dormer windows, and the exterior walls are painted white. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by small shrubs and landscaping. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with larger windows on the main floor and smaller ones on the upper level. The property is surrounded by open grass, with no visible fencing or neighboring structures. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with classic American architectural elements.
description: A white, two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, covered porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a large green lawn with a curved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, and the curved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side elevation, windows, and landscaping along the house perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional windows and a clear view of the expansive lawn.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the driveway extending past the house and more landscaping details.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door
